name: design_handoff_ironhaus_site
description: IRONHAUS is a local strength & conditioning gym. This package contains the full marketing website design: a dark-themed landing page plus six sub-pages (About, Trainers, Equipment, Pricing, Schedule, Area/Contact). The visual language is bold and industrial — condensed uppercase display type, a near-black canvas, and a single electric-green accent. The task is to build this out as a real, deployable website.
